subcodes.first_line: A remembrance unto him who desireth to take up the chalice of divine knowledge in the name of his Lord, the All-Merciful, and to drink therefrom amidst the concourse of all created things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر لمن اراد ان یاخذ کوب العرفان باسم ربه الرحمن و یشرب منه بین ملا الاکوان
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @the power of words; of speech, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @wisdom [hikmat]
